# By MAM Studio

By MAM Studio is an AI systems and brand consulting studio founded by Michael A. Marino, based in New York City (Hoboken, NJ). We build AI implementation programs, brand systems, digital platforms, and brand infrastructure for small businesses, operators, and growth-stage organizations.

## What We Do

### AI Systems
- **AI Audit & Roadmap**: Scored diagnostic across 6 maturity dimensions with 90-day transformation roadmap
- **Marketing AI Implementation Sprint**: 30-60 day programs implementing AI across marketing workflows
- **HR AI Implementation Sprint**: 45-75 day programs implementing the 5-layer HR AI architecture
- **Custom Claude Skills Library Build**: Architecting and deploying custom skills libraries for organizations
- **AI Operations Retainer**: Ongoing maintenance for deployed AI systems

### Brand & Web
- **Brand Systems Architecture**: Full brand infrastructure — architecture, identity, governance, and experience principles
- **Creative Direction**: Executive-level creative governance across campaigns, products, and brand touchpoints
- **Design Strategy**: Align brand vision to measurable business outcomes with decision frameworks
- **Digital Experiences & Platform Design**: Multi-layered digital platforms built around trust and conversion architecture
- **Service Website Modernization**: The Modern Service Conversion System™ for trades and home service operators

## Products

- **The AI Marketing Engine Playbook** ($149): 9-module AI marketing operating system with 50-prompt library
- **AI Readiness Scorecard & Transformation Roadmap** ($249): 6-dimension diagnostic with 365-day roadmap
- **AI for HR & People Operations Playbook** ($99): Complete HR AI transformation framework and implementation guide
- **The Claude Skills Architecture Playbook** ($199): Methodology for building custom Claude skills libraries

## Portfolio

Active engagements across brand systems, digital infrastructure, and experience design:

- **Avédon Collective**: Luxury streetwear infrastructure and identity system — Infrastructure + Identity
- **MT Mug Coffee**: Commerce-ready coffee brand platform — Commerce + Identity
- **Staten News**: Digital publishing architecture for weekly distribution — Digital + Visual
- **Bobby Black NYC**: Operational order and menu infrastructure for a fast-moving food brand — Infrastructure + Commerce

## Contact

- Email: hello@bymamstudio.com
- Website: https://bymamstudio.com
- Parent company: Avoren Group (https://avorengroup.com)
- Location: NYC Metro / Remote US

## Founder

Michael A. Marino — multi-venture founder, AI systems architect, and brand infrastructure designer. Budgeting and accounting professional at New York Life Insurance Company. Creator of the AI governance frameworks and HR COE deployment models used in By MAM Studio's product catalog. Founding Architect of Avédon Collective, Co-Founding Partner of MT Mug Coffee, and Founding Publisher of Staten News.
